project_requirements: Publish the completed slot-based governance artifact workflow as a Project Governor patch release.
Keep Codex and Claude Code plugin metadata, release notes, feature matrix, tests, and install instructions in sync.

dependencies.name: Project Governor plugin
dependencies.notes: Patch release for deterministic artifact rendering, revision-checked slot updates, context-indexer generated Markdown slot indexing, docs, memory, and tests. No dependency or runtime service change is required.
